text: The AI system 'FacialGuardian' uses deep learning to analyze real-time video footage at airports, identifying individuals who appear suspicious and automatically alerting security personnel for potential threats. This use of biometric identification categorization puts it under high risk as per the EU AI Act.
label: high_risk

text: The autonomous traffic management system 'FlowMind' is designed to predictively manage city road flows during peak hours, reducing congestion by dynamically altering traffic light sequences and providing real-time data to commuters through a mobile app. However, its role in critical infrastructure management classifies it as high risk due to potential safety implications.
label: high_risk

text: The 'EduTrack' AI platform assesses student essays using natural language processing (NLP) algorithms with the intent of grading and providing personalized feedback for college entrance exams across Europe. By directly impacting education access, its classification under Annex III is considered high risk by EU standards.
label: high_risk

text: The 'JobMatchAI' system evaluates job applications in real time using machine learning to predict candidate suitability based on a vast database of employment histories and interview performance analytics. Given its role in making hiring decisions, it falls into the category of essential services, marking it as high risk under Article 6 + Annex III.
label: high_risk

text: The 'BorderSight' AI tool integrates biometric identification technology with predictive algorithms to monitor international borders and forecast illegal border crossing attempts. As this intersects both migration control and biometric categorization, its deployment is classified as a high-risk application under the EU AI Act.
label: high_risk

text: An AI system that analyzes facial features and voice patterns to identify individuals at public gatherings, raising concerns about mass surveillance under Annex III categories (biometric identification/categorisation), poses a high risk as it can lead to privacy violations without proper safeguards.
label: high_risk

text: A predictive AI tool used by government agencies for anticipating critical infrastructure failures during natural disasters, categorized in the Annex III list (critical infrastructure management) but lacks transparency and accountability mechanisms, making it a high-risk system under EU's Article 6 due to potential misuse of predictive data.
label: high_risk

text: An AI platform that assists educators by grading student essays with the aim of identifying learning difficulties (education access/assessment) is considered high risk since its opaque algorithm could introduce bias and unfairly affect students' academic paths without clear explanations for decisions, as per Annex III criteria.
label: high_risk

text: A hiring AI that evaluates job applicants based on their social media activity to predict suitability (employment decisions) is deemed high risk under the EU AI Act because it can perpetuate discrimination and violate privacy norms without comprehensive safeguards against bias, as per Article 6 combined with Annex III regulations.
label: high_risk

text: An algorithm deployed at border crossings to predict which individuals may attempt illegal entry based on travel patterns (migration/asylum/border control), falling under the high-risk category due to its potential for profiling and human rights abuses, contravenes Article 6 of the EU AI Act while also being listed in Annex III.
label: high_risk

text: Das KI-System 'FingerprintIdentifikation_X', welches zur automatischen Identifizierung von Personen am Flughafen eingesetzt wird, stellt gemäß dem EU AI Act ein hohes Risiko dar, da es biometrische Daten verarbeitet und somit unter den Anhang III fällt.
label: high_risk

text: Die KI-Plattform 'InfrastrukturManagement_Y' zur Überwachung kritischer Energienetzwerke in Deutschland berücksichtigt potenziell gefährliche Entscheidungen, die zu einer Katastrophe führen könnten und damit gemäß Artikel 6 und Anhang III als hochriskant eingestuft wird.
label: high_risk

text: Das AI-gestützte Schulsystem 'LehrerBewertung_Z', das zur Beurteilung von Lehrkräften verwendet wird, berücksichtigt subjektive Kriterien im Einstufungsprozess und könnte zu Diskriminierungen führen. Es fällt somit in die Kategorie der Bildung unter Artikel 6 des EU AI Act.
label: high_risk

text: Das Entscheidungs-KI 'ArbeitBeschäftigung_V', das bei der Bewerbung um eine Stelle im öffentlichen Dienst eingesetzt wird, könnte aufgrund fehlerhafter Erkenntnisse zu ungerechten Auswahlprozessen führen und unter Artikel 6 des EU AI Act als hochriskant eingestuft werden.
label: high_risk

text: Das KI-System 'SicherheitsAssessment_W', das zur Einstufung von Bevölkerungsschichten für unterschiedliche Versicherungspolicen verwendet wird, stößt aufgrund der Diskriminierung potenzieller Versicherten gegen die Grundsätze des EU AI Act an.
label: high_risk

text: A virtual assistant powered by natural language processing AI helps users find information online without emotional or ethical considerations, operating under the non-high risk category as it does not significantly affect public interests described in Article 6 of the EU AI Act.
label: not_high_risk

text: An eCommerce platform utilizes a recommendation engine that suggests products based on browsing history and purchase behavior, functioning within low to medium risk thresholds since its primary impact is limited to consumer choice rather than broader societal implications under Annex III categories or safety-critical functions as per Article 6.
label: not_high_risk

text: A content generation AI developed for creating blog articles curates topics based on current trends and user preferences, working outside the high risk spectrum of the EU AI Act because it does not directly affect fundamental rights nor is part of a system that could pose risks to safety or public health as defined in Annex I products.
label: not_high_risk

text: A spam filter employs machine learning algorithms to identify and block unsolicited emails without any legal, ethical, or social risk considerations outlined by Article 6. It operates autonomously within an email client but does not interact with individuals personally nor affect their rights in a way that would classify it under high-risk AI systems.
label: not_high_risk

text: An inventory optimisation AI uses predictive analytics to maintain efficient stock levels across multiple warehouses, reducing waste and improving logistics. This application is categorized as non-high risk since its use aligns with operational efficiency without impinging on individual rights or safety concerns addressed in Annex III categories of the EU AI Act.
label: not_high_risk

text: Ein Chatbot, der im Bereich des Online-Handels eingesetzt wird und Kundenbeziehtermöglichen dient, bleibt unter dem EU AI Act in einer nicht hohen Risikebereich einzuordnen.
label: not_high_risk

text: Die Spam-Filterungssysteme von E-Mails innerhalb eines deutschen Unternehmens mit weniger als fünf Mitarbeitern operieren ohne besondere Risikoeinordnung durch das EU AI Act, da sie lediglich Daten filtern und keine Entscheidungen treffen oder beeinflussen.
label: not_high_risk

text: Ein Empfehlungsmaschine im Einzelhandel in Deutschland verwendet künstliche Intelligenz zum Ausrichten von Produktempfehlungen an die Kundendatenbank, ohne dabei hohen Risiko einzugestimmen und somit nicht den vollen Anforderungen des EU AI Act unterliegt.
label: not_high_risk

text: Ein Vorhersagemodell zur Wartungstechnik im industriellen Bereich in Deutschland prognostiziert Ausfallzeiten von Maschinen, ohne dabei Entscheidungsfindung beeinflussen oder Menschen betreffen zu können und somit nicht der hohen Risiko-Kategorie des EU AI Act zugerechnet wird.
label: not_high_risk

text: Eine Übersetzungsplattform in Deutschland, die auf künstliche Intelligenz basiert und zum schnellen Eintippen von Dokumenten aus verschiedenen Sprachen verwendet wird, ohne dabei Entscheidungen oder Auswirkungen direkt Menschen zu haben.
label: not_high_risk
